# Retaa

*A world generated by Cartogenesis v0.11.0 from seed `aurelia-9`. Regenerate it exactly with `node src/cli.ts generate --seed aurelia-9`.*

## Overview

- **Extent:** 360 × 360 cells
- **Land / ocean:** 31.9% land, 68.1% ocean, 0 lake(s)
- **Climate & life:** dominant biome **Savanna**, 14 biomes in all
- **Peoples:** 19 regions, 13 settlements, 2 realms
- **Capital:** Niniri, seat of House Popialenre
- **Dominant power:** Neneo (of 1 surviving realm(s))
- **The present year:** 1164 After Reckoning

## Notable features

- **Mount Rasaumar** — the highest peak
- **The Diare** — the greatest river

## Notable figures

- **Veonalo, the Explorer** — Veonalo charted the far coasts and traced the Diare to its source.
- **Devillaria, the Mountaineer** — Devillaria was first to stand atop Rasaumar and return alive.
- **Pialeeo, the General** — Pialeeo broke the long siege of Niniri.
- **Deonasano, the Architect** — Deonasano raised the great road between Niniri and Dendomau.
- **Lalenla, the Heretic** — Lalenla was exiled from Niniri for denying the old gods.

## Faiths

### the Rite of Peonabeteo — Peonabeteo, god of the Harvest

> Peonabeteo scattered the first seed across Eteossora; the golden fields were the gift, and the tithe the price.

Followed across 13 region(s).

### the Cult of Jimakhiur — Jimakhiur, god of the Hearth

> Jimakhiur lit the first hearth in Saqaesh, and its flame has never since gone out.

Followed across 6 region(s).

## Resources & trade

- **Major exports:** Livestock, Grain, Horses, Timber, Wine
- **Wealthiest settlement:** Niniri
- **Trade hubs:** Niniri, Naubatau
- **Deposits:** Iron ×15, Copper ×11, Gold ×4, Gems ×3, Stone ×35, Coal ×15, Timber ×9, Grain ×23, Livestock ×92, Fish ×10, Furs ×1, Spices ×2, Salt ×6, Horses ×31, Wine ×12

## Legends of the founding age

- **55 After Reckoning** — The city of Niniri was founded on a sheltered harbour, destined to become the seat of power.
- **69 After Reckoning** — The city of Dendomau was founded on a sheltered harbour.
- **71 After Reckoning** — Niniri rose to rule its hinterland, and the realm of Retaa was proclaimed.
- **81 After Reckoning** — Dendomau rose to rule its hinterland, and the realm of Seomorrauleo was proclaimed.
- **256 After Reckoning** — A great storm-tide flooded Niniri; the lower quarters were lost to the sea.
- **354 After Reckoning** — Over the tolls of the Diare, Retaa and Seomorrauleo went to war; a marriage-pact bound Retaa and Seomorrauleo in uneasy peace.
- **397 After Reckoning** — Rasaumar woke in fire and ash; a hard winter followed, and harvests failed across the land.
- **1112 After Reckoning** — Under a long peace, Niniri flourished; its libraries and roads became the wonder of the world.
